name: GRIT
text: What the drying could not wear out of you. Halor's virtue: endurance, keeping, the refusal to spoil.

talents.name: Salt-Skin
talents.text: The flats cure you like good meat. +20 health.

talents.name: Keeper's Larder
talents.text: A third meal stays down. What is kept well, keeps you.

talents.name: Pillar-Stand
talents.text: When you become the pillar, you become it thoroughly. Pillar of Salt lasts half again as long.

name: STORM
text: The weather that got into your blood. Maren's virtue: ferocity spent all at once, without apology.

talents.name: Whaler's Arm
talents.text: You swing like the boats never stopped going out. +6 damage.

talents.name: Squall-Born
talents.text: The squall knows its own. Calling it costs Maren a quarter less.

talents.name: Bolt-Marked
talents.text: The storm signs your work. Every swing carries a little lightning. +8 damage.

name: TIDE
text: The rhythm the water kept and you keep still. Neris's virtue: timing, recovery, the long return.

talents.name: Second Wind
talents.text: Your breath comes back like something owed to you. Stamina recovers half again as fast.

talents.name: Slack-Water
talents.text: You spend effort at slack, not against the flood. Swings cost 5 less stamina.

talents.name: The Returning
talents.text: What goes out comes back — once a day, even you. The first death each day leaves you at 1 health instead.

name: CURRENT
text: The shortest way, worn into your legs. Vessa's virtue: swiftness, reach, arriving before the news of you.

talents.name: Flats-Runner
talents.text: Distance argues less with you. +15% move speed.

talents.name: Long Arms
talents.text: You gather from where you stand, mostly. +12 reach on harvest and interaction.

talents.name: Undertow Step
talents.text: The dark is a current; you ride it. Another +15% speed at night.

name: WILD
text: The part of you the beasts recognize. Old Ghal's virtue: patience with everything hungry and honest.

talents.name: Soft-Step
talents.text: You smell less like prey. Hounds notice you from a quarter closer.

talents.name: Crab-Friend
talents.text: You take crabs the respectful way, and there is more of them for it. +1 meat.

talents.name: Herd-Sense
talents.text: Beasts hesitate before biting what Old Ghal has touched. Hounds strike you slower.

name: HUNGER
text: The empty place the sea left, and what you are willing to put in it. The Unlit's virtue. He is delighted you asked.

talents.name: Take More
talents.text: The flats owe you, in your accounting. +1 to every harvest.

talents.name: Waste Nothing
talents.text: You eat like the dark eats: completely. Meals restore half again as much.

talents.name: The Unlit Feast
talents.text: You have learned to chew what gods are made of. Consumed remnants grant +25 health instead. The warm voice is so proud.
